title: hieracium fratrum
intro: Hieracium fratrum, also known as Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant's medicinal properties include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Hieracium fratrum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Hieracium fratrum can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, and are often used to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne.
